description: 19 years of doctor-led aesthetic care, across 6 branches in Bangkok.
companyHistory: Founded in 2007 by four colleagues from Srinakharinwirot and Mahidol Universities, KKC Clinic began as a single practice dedicated to evidence-based aesthetic medicine.
mission: to provide science-backed aesthetic and anti-aging care that helps you look refreshed and feel confident, without ever compromising on safety or integrity.
